title: Fix test creation issue - restore previous functionality

requirements.text: Restore the test creation functionality to its previous working state by reverting any recent changes that broke the test creation flow in CreateTestPanel and useTestForm

quotes: i am facing issue on creating tests. please fix it as it was previous

acceptanceCriteria: Test creation modal opens without errors
All question types can be added successfully
Tests can be saved to the backend without errors

requirements.text: Verify that the CreateTest mutation in useQueries properly accepts authentication credentials and creates tests in the backend without validation errors

quotes: i am facing issue on creating tests

acceptanceCriteria: CreateTest mutation completes successfully with valid credentials
Backend main.mo createTest function processes requests without errors
Created tests appear in the test list immediately after creation

requirements.text: Ensure QuestionBuilder component properly handles all question type configurations and media uploads without breaking the test creation process
acceptanceCriteria: All question types (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short answer, long answer, matching, fill-in-the-blank) work correctly
Media uploads for images and audio complete successfully
Question options are properly validated and saved

constraints: Do not modify authentication flow or credentials system
Preserve existing test data structures and backend schema
Maintain compatibility with existing tests and student responses
nonGoals: Changing the UI design or layout
Modifying test-taking interface or results display
